dbbot v0.1.0-beta.1 focuses on MySQL package preparation consistency and clearer operator feedback.

This beta fixes the MySQL package existence pre-check so it follows mysql_packages_dir instead of a hard-coded ../downloads path, and it adds a regression test for custom package directories in the repository.

It also refines the jemalloc dependency flow to probe yum repository availability before falling back to the bundled RPM on minimal hosts, avoiding a misleading ignored failure during expected fallback behavior.

This beta further renames the unsafe uninstall play to match its real purpose and clarifies that the shipped sample inventory addresses are documentation-only RFC 5737 examples.
